titles.title: The Name of the Lord Is a Strong Tower

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The name of the Lord is A strong tower, The righteous run into And they are saved, The name of the Lord is A strong tower The righteous run into it And they are saved.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Blessed be the name of the Lord, Blessed be the name of the Lord, Blessed be the name of the Lord, the Most High Blessed be the name of the Lord, Blessed be the name of the Lord, Blessed be the name of the Lord, the Most High.
